mapper.select: SELECT wh.whid, wh.name AS warehouse_name, wc.name AS warehouse_city, wr.name AS warehouse_region, inv.quantity, CASE WHEN wh.cityid = #{destinationCityId} THEN '同城市' WHEN rd.distance_level = 0 THEN '同枢纽区域' WHEN rd.distance_level = 1 THEN '相邻枢纽区域' ELSE '其他区域' END AS reason, CASE WHEN wh.cityid = #{destinationCityId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS city_rank, rd.distance_level FROM warehouse wh JOIN city wc ON wc.cityid = wh.cityid JOIN hub_region wr ON wr.regionid = wc.regionid JOIN inventory inv ON inv.whid = wh.whid AND inv.goodsid = #{goodsId} JOIN city dc ON dc.cityid = #{destinationCityId} JOIN region_distance rd ON rd.from_regionid = wc.regionid AND rd.to_regionid = dc.regionid WHERE inv.quantity > 0 ORDER BY city_rank, rd.distance_level, inv.quantity DESC
